title: Fooductive: FD Addon
description: This Addon of Fooductive adds Support between Farmers Delight and Fooductive!
body:
# Addon of Fooductive and Farmer's Delight  
**This Requires both Mods, so [https://modrinth.com/mod/hasi.fooductive](https://modrinth.com/mod/hasi.fooductive) and [https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**  
> Chocolate
- This brings new Chocolate and White
- Molten and Cut
- A new Advancement Tab under the Original Farmer's Delight Tab
- As well Packed Chocolate bonbons
# Cutting and Cooking additions
> Pizza
- Cheese Pizza and Peperoni can be cut via Cutting Board
> Pattys
- Cooking Patties on **Campfire + on Skillets**
> Buns
- Top and Bottom Buns cutting from Bun
> Soap
- try cutting Soap
> Boiled Egg
- Cook an Egg in a Skillet and see what happens
# Mixed Items
> Rice
- Rice from Additions and Farmer's Delight mixed together
- Easier Rice Ball and Onigiri Production
> Rope
- Adds 2 new Strings
- Bound, means a rope
- Bounded, means bounded with a belt
# **Other Foods and adds**
> Tapes
- White
- Black
- Red
- Orange
- So on
> Melon
- Inner Melon and The Crusty outer
> Apple
- Cut
- Apple Cider with Cut Apple also cookable
